raw_consumer_statement: I had a Best Buy Credit card through Citibank. With one of the purchases, I had a subscription to XXXX XXXX. The subscription auto-renewed. I contacted the Credit card company and told them that I did not want the subscription and that it was canceled online. They told me that I had to pay for to pro rata share of the subscription. I informed them that the error was on their end. They originally charged me {$330.00} for the subscription that I did not want or need. After numerous calls to both Best Buy and Citibank, this has gone nowhere. This has been in dispute since XXXX of 2023. Since then, they have reported me delinquent to the Credit agencies and attempted to extort this money from me.
